rawIntent: Add an isEven utility under src/shared/utils/is-even with isEven(n: number): boolean.

successCriteria.description: The isEven utility function is implemented and returns a boolean indicating if the input number is even.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record.
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline.
Input validated at the API boundary.
outOfScope: Any other utilities or files outside of src/shared/utils/is-even.
